emails.subject: Final Associate/Analyst 2000 PRC - Jacoby
emails.body: I wonder with Joe Sutton gone if they can cancel the worldwide Analyst and Associate PRC. It take a lot of time away from our people and we are ranking them ourselves anyway. John Forwarded by John J Lavorato/Corp/Enron on 11/01/2000 07:22 AM Gwendolyn Gray 11/01/2000 12:13 AM

emails.subject: Re: Final Associate/Analyst 2000 PRC - Jacoby
emails.body: Re: Final Associate/Analyst 2000 PRC Jacoby John, this is a Skilling issue Charlene and myself are going to talk to him about several changes in the next couple of weeks. Regards Delainey
